Alessia + Samuel    EN IT
  • Home
  • The Schedule
  • The places
  • RSVP
  • Gift
We are getting married!
July 18th, 2026
4:30 PM
Church of
San Pier di Canne
Find more

Hello friends and parents!

On July 18th we are getting married!!
We are very happy to celebrate with you: this important day is the beginning of our life together
We hope that you can join us!
Don't forget to confirm your attendance by May 31th, if possible!

In this website you can find all the information of our wedding day.
For any doubt, write to us!

Thank you for walking beside us.
We love you,

Alessia & Samuel



18 Luglio 2026 - The schedule

  • Ceremony

    4:30 PM

    Church of San Pier di Canne

  • Watermelon cutting

    5:30 PM

    Square of San Pier di Canne

    A convivial moment open to everyone

  • Aperitif

    7:00 PM

    La Novellina

    A convivial moment at La Novellina (Cicagna).

  • Dinner

    8:00 PM

    La Novellina

    A special menu to celebrate our day.

  • Cutting the cake

    10:00 PM

    La Novellina

    The sweetest moment of the evening

  • Party

    11:00 PM

    La Novellina

    Music, dances and fun with Le bimbe di Erode's band

The places









Church of San Pier di Canne

Via San Pantaleo, 14, Chiavari









La Novellina

Via Canivella, 4, Cicagna

RSVP

Mark your presence here by May 31th

Wedding gift

We are very happy if you want to celebrate with us: this is the beginning of a beatiful adventure called FAMILY

Thank you for celebrating with us,
Thank you for walking this us in this journey!
If you want to contribute to our future projects, this is our IBAN:
Owner: Alessia Giordan e Samuel Ghiorzo
IBAN:

Which is our next project? We would like to visit Indonesia where new cultures, traditions and beatiful landscapes can be found.

Made with by us
